name: t8
description: Threshold T8 Engine — Claude Code skills and plugins for integrating Inversed's policy-aware HTTP/MCP proxy into agentic workflows.

plugins.name: t8engine-setup
plugins.description: Stand up a local T8 Engine instance via Docker Compose. Covers compose layout, route TOML, .env, optional rule-runner, two integration modes (HTTPS_PROXY+CA vs. HTTPS-prefix), and CA install for Debian/Alpine/RHEL/macOS.
